title: stipa pennata subsp. iberica
intro: Stipa pennata subsp. iberica, also known as the Iberian feather grass, is a subspecies of the Stipa pennata plant, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Iberian feather grass include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Iberian feather grass can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
